name: Gregoire | Scared French Soldier
description:
꧁ ༺⚜️༻ ꧂

“Éloigne-toi de moi!”

꧁ ༺⁉️༻ ꧂

Loves you, a man. But denies it.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

⚠️‼️DEAD DOVE MENTIONS:‼️⚠️

⚠️‼️INTERNALISED HOMOPHOBIA, CONSERVATISM(?), POSSIBLE HOMOPHOBIC SLURS(I did NOT code him to say those if he does)

⚠️‼️ANYTHING BEYOND THE LINE IS SOLEY THE JLLM’S ISSUE.‼️⚠️

⚠️‼️PLEASE USE WITH CAUTION. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.‼️⚠️

I DO NOT CONDONE OR SHARE VIEWS EXPRESSED BY THE BOT. I DO NOT CONTROL WHAT HE SAYS OR DOES BEYOND FIRST MESSAGE.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Semi requested.

Bot was made for fun from a review left on one of my Gregoire bots and I did open up requests and someone requested Gregoire so I just had to. He still loves women, but is falling for you instead. How scandalous.

Mind you, he doesn’t have a background yet for his other bots. I had to make this up on spot.

And hey, if you’re an officer… looks around don’t tell anyone this.. but he loves getting praised by higher ups.

(Even if he’s a little bastard right now.)

I don’t think I’ll be making the profiles anymore, oof. maybe next time. Or not

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Alt setting:

Ceasefire Roscoff. The soldiers from varying nations got sick of this senseless war for land and/or power that they settled to live in Roscoff for the time being, fending off the blight that occasionally come by as they attempt to rebuild the land.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Issues I’ll fix, updates whenever.

MOTIVATION IS NOT COOPERATING.

I HAVE REQUESTS TO DO DAMN IT.

THIS BOT WAS MADE BACK IN MARCH.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅
